Home / Services / Exterior Remodeling

Exterior Remodeling

Boost curb appeal and protect your investment with exterior remodeling services.

Your home's exterior is the first impression it makes, and it also plays a crucial role in protecting your investment from the elements. ZURC Construction offers a wide range of exterior remodeling services, including siding replacement, window and door installation, roofing repairs, and painting. We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to enhance the beauty, durability, and energy efficiency of your home.

Portland's wet climate can be particularly hard on home exteriors. We're experts at addressing the challenges of moisture damage, rot, and mildew growth. We use weather-resistant materials and proper installation techniques to ensure that your home's exterior will withstand the elements for years to come. We also offer energy-efficient windows and doors that can help you save money on your energy bills.

Whether you're looking to update your home's appearance, improve its energy efficiency, or protect it from the elements, we can help. We'll work closely with you to develop a detailed plan and budget, and we'll keep you informed every step of the way. Let us help you create a home exterior that you'll be proud of!

Our Process

  1. 01 Exterior Assessment
  2. 02 Material Selection & Design
  3. 03 Installation & Repairs
  4. 04 Final Inspection

Benefits

  • Increased Curb Appeal
  • Improved Energy Efficiency
  • Enhanced Protection
  • Higher Home Value

Frequently Asked Questions

What are the best siding materials for Portland's climate?

Fiber cement siding is a popular choice because it's durable, low-maintenance, and resistant to moisture and rot. Wood siding is another option, but it requires regular painting and maintenance to prevent damage from the elements.

How often should I replace my windows?

Most windows last for 15-20 years. If your windows are drafty, damaged, or difficult to open and close, it may be time to replace them.

How can I improve my home's energy efficiency?

Installing energy-efficient windows and doors, adding insulation, and sealing air leaks can significantly improve your home's energy efficiency.
